examples: The rapid expansion in international trade also benefitted from an infusion of capital, stemming largely from gold and silver brought by Spanish vessels from the Americas.
He brought a tremendous infusion of hope to the people.
Tisane is an herbal infusion not made from the leaves of the tea bush.
Citi stepped in earlier this month with an equity infusion into Ameriquest, another struggling lender.
With meals he has a cup of hot water, uncontaminated by any herbal infusion.
